arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Dusan Vlahovic, Evan Ferguson, Jonathan David
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Glasner on balancing tactics with emotion at Brighton
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace are approaching Sunday’s match away at rivals Brighton & Hove Albion with the same focus as a normal gameweek – but that his players can harness the emotion of the game when kick-off comes around.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace defender suffered ‘reaction’ after featuring in U21 cup game
arts.sum: It was his first outing following a lengthy knee injury he suffered 10 minutes into his second appearance, an EFL Cup fixture against Norwich City in August. Riad was largely untested in his 45-minute appearance in the Premier League International Cup game against a very youthful Anderlecht on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: ‘We will see the best Ebs soon’ - Palace boss Glasner on Eze’s lack of goals
arts.sum: Having been away from the Crystal Palace side for three matches through injury, Eberechi Eze found himself starting three games in a week on his return. Then he’s started all three games after his injury.

arts.ttl: Risk-taking welcome for Palace boss Glasner as Devenny continues to impress
arts.sum: Maybe these are the best years in your life as you don’t think about tomorrow. And the 50-year-old Austrian coach continues to enjoy his time in South London, learning off of his playing squad, especially the younger players.

arts.ttl: Palace boss Glasner praises club captain despite lack of playing minutes
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has told the South London Press that club captain Joel Ward remains a vital part of his matchday squad despite the 35-year-old not featuring in the Premier League so far this season. Everyone, every manager, wishes to have such a guy, not just a player – he’s a great player, the most appearances in the Premier League for Crystal Palace more than 300 – but he’s an outstanding, good and positive character,” said the Austrian coach.

arts.ttl: 'What a machine': Crystal Palace star hailed by emotional technical director who sold him for £7m
arts.sum: He's become a favourite at Selhurst Park...

arts.ttl: The best ways to watch & follow Brighton v Palace LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's next Premier League fixture sees them travel to take on arch-rivals Brighton & Hove Albion on Sunday (15th December, KO: 14:00 GMT) – and there are plenty of ways you can follow the action LIVE.

arts.ttl: Team News: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Brighton & Hove Albion and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: 'Brilliant': Manager admits Crystal Palace target will 'play in the Premier League soon' with talks underway
